project_type: Next.js 16 web app with custom dark design system
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test script in package.json)
verification_instructions: 1. npm install, 2. npm run typecheck passes, 3. npm run build succeeds without errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode - full access to npm registry. Node.js v22 available.
contribution_requirements: Project uses shadcn/ui new-york style. Tailwind v4 imported without preflight (base layer disabled). All tokens in globals.css + theme.css. The design system is exclusively dark mode.
key_patterns: The Ask page uses scoped CSS classes (.ask-canvas, .ask-title, .ask-composer, etc.) defined in globals.css. shadcn components use Tailwind utility classes with CSS variable tokens from theme.css. The design system follows DESIGN.md Framer spec: near-black canvas (#090909), white ink, single blue accent (#0099ff), poster-grade display type with aggressive negative tracking, white pill CTAs, charcoal surfaces, gradient spotlight cards. Inter Variable with OpenType features cv01/cv05/cv09/cv11/ss03/ss07.
directory_structure: osai-web/app/ - Next.js app router pages; osai-web/app/ask/page.tsx - the Ask OSAI page; osai-web/app/globals.css - full design system CSS (~1890 lines); osai-web/app/theme.css - Tailwind v4 + shadcn token mapping; osai-web/components/ask/ - Ask page sub-components (action-card, citation-chip, markdown-lite, message-bubble); osai-web/components/ui/ - shadcn/ui components; osai-web/lib/ - utilities, API, types, demo data
